demo_purpose: Stage 2 (in-visit transcription) + Stage 4 (low-cost STT with diarization) proof
transcript_speaker_labelled:
DOCTOR: अंदर आइए. बैठिए. What's bothering you today?
PATIENT: Doctor साहब, मुझे तीन दिन से बुखार है और बहुत body pain है.
DOCTOR: How much fever? Did you check?
PATIENT: एक सौ दो degree था कल रात. आज सुबह headache भी था.
DOCTOR: Vomiting, loose motion, rash anywhere?
PATIENT: नहीं doctor, बस कमज़ोरी है.
DOCTOR: Ok, we will check CBC, dengue NSA, malaria smear, take paracetamol पांच सौ milligram three times. Drink ORS, come back if fever crosses 103 or rash appears.
note_about_emr_step: Claude tool-forced EMR extraction (ICD-10/11 + meds + investigations) runs on this transcript. Demo artifact pending Anthropic API credit top-up.
